title: engines.engine_intent_recorded
description: ADR-038 Layer 3 (WS-277) terminal event — fired when cwos-frame.js confirm writes a finalized intent contract before engine execution. Reducer can join engine outputs back to the contract via contract_id for post-hoc 'did this engine answer the question it was asked?' audit.

contract_id.description: Stable id identifying this contract; used by engine outputs to reference back

target.description: Focus/target argument passed to /engine — file path, program name, or free text

readiness_reason.description: When readiness=defer, the structured signal explaining why

success_shape.description: Structured per WS-269 template; enums where possible

stretch.description: When true, engine questions loaded AS-N tags + constraints

failed_states_seed.description: WS-296 / FIND-129: Failed-State excerpts injected at compose time so the engine reads constitutional anchors from the envelope, not from system/intention.md (upholds INV-cli-envelope-consumed-completely). Matched BY NAME (not index) to defeat renumbering attacks. section_hash detects any edit to the Failed States block; per-state content_hash pinpoints which anchor moved.

section_hash.description: SHA-256 of the entire `## Failed States` section content (hex)

source_path.description: Repo-relative path to the source file, e.g. system/intention.md

name.description: Bolded title of the failed state, e.g. 'Compliance over value'

content.description: Full body text of the state (after the bolded title), or null if not found

position_at_compose.description: 1-based index in the Failed States list at compose time (informational; renumbering is detected via section_hash)

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of `name + content` (hex). Empty string when content is null.

warnings.description: Per-state extraction warnings (e.g. requested name not found in source).

revisions.description: Fields the founder edited from defaults during pre-flight. Empty array means defaults accepted as-is.
